prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.9 kg; Height 165.1 cm; BMI 23.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 249mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 269mg/dL; current 228mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.8kg; 9 months ago 63.8kg; 6 months ago 62.2kg; 3 months ago 60.7kg; current 64.9kg), Height (12 months ago 165.1cm; 9 months ago 165.1cm; 6 months ago 165.1cm; 3 months ago 165.1cm; current 165.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 23.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 339mg/g; 9 months ago 369mg/g; 6 months ago 382mg/g; 3 months ago 289mg/g; current 413mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 120mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
